title: ErrorResponse
description: Standard error response body returned by the Platform API for all 4xx and 5xx responses.

code.description: Stable snake_case error code identifying the error class. Never changes across versions.

message.description: Human-readable description of the error. Suitable for display in developer tooling. Never exposes implementation details (stack traces, SQL errors, file paths).
examples: not found: mcp_server with id abc123

request_id.description: Per-request ULID. Matches the X-Request-ID response header. Use this value when filing a bug report or contacting support.
